framework.name: Explainable AI as Trust Requirement
framework.description: Brief mention that building trust through explainable AI is crucial for maintaining Lean's ethical focus. This acknowledges that black-box AI recommendations will face resistance in continuous improvement cultures that value understanding root causes.
framework.raw_quote: building trust through explainable AI is crucial in maintaining Lan's ethical Focus

source.title: Warning: If you're still approaching Lean Six Sigma the traditional way, you risk falling behind 🚨
